description: Financial results extraction — Microsoft Q2 FY2024

input.text: Microsoft Corporation announced revenue of $62.0 billion for the second quarter of fiscal year 2024, up 18% year over year. Cloud revenue (Azure and other cloud services) grew 28% to $25.9 billion. Net income was $21.9 billion, or $2.93 per diluted share. Operating income increased 33% to $27.0 billion.
